hero.headline: Expert Repairs, Body Work & Alignments – All Under One Roof
hero.subheadline: From minor tune-ups to major collision repairs, we deliver quality service that keeps you safe on the road.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Mechanical Repairs
featureSections.body: Our ASE-certified technicians handle everything from brake repairs and engine diagnostics to transmission service and AC repair. We use state-of-the-art equipment to get you back on the road fast.
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your confidence.

featureSections.title: Expert Body Shop Services
featureSections.body: From minor dents to major collision damage, our body shop restores your vehicle to its pre-accident condition. We work with all insurance companies and offer color-matched painting.
bullets: Dent repair and paintless dent removal
featureSections.cardBody: We use OEM-grade paint and blending techniques for a seamless match.

testimonials.author: Mike D.

testimonials.quote: After a fender bender, they fixed my bumper and paint perfectly. You can't even tell it was damaged!

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Top-Tier Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Call us or stop by today – we're conveniently located on S Fitzhugh Ave.

servicesPage.intro: At Ramirez Auto Repair, Body Shop & Wheel Alignment LLC, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle running smoothly and looking great. From routine maintenance to collision repair, our skilled team delivers quality workmanship at fair prices.

services.title: Auto Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Complete mechanical services including engine, transmission, brakes, and routine maintenance.
services.longDescription: Our ASE-certified mechanics diagnose and repair all makes and models. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly and perform repairs using quality parts. Services include oil changes, brake pads, timing belts, water pumps, and more.
benefits: Extend vehicle life with proper maintenance
Safety inspections included with every service
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We run a comprehensive diagnostic scan to identify all issues.

process.title: Estimate
process.description: You receive a detailed estimate with transparent pricing.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: After approval, we complete repairs and test-drive to ensure quality.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000–7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask our technicians.

faqs.question: Do you work on all car brands?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service domestic and import vehicles, including Ford, Chevrolet, Toyota, Honda, and more.

services.title: Body Shop & Collision Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert collision repair, dent removal, and painting to restore your vehicle's appearance.
services.longDescription: Our body shop handles everything from minor scratches to major collision damage. We work with all insurance companies and provide free estimates. Our painters use color-matching technology to ensure a seamless finish.
benefits: Restore resale value with professional repairs
Insurance claim assistance – we handle the paperwork
Paintless dent repair for hail and door dings

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We inspect damage and provide a detailed repair plan.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our technicians straighten frames, replace panels, and prepare surfaces.

process.title: Paint & Finish
process.description: We apply OEM-quality paint and clear coat for a factory finish.

faqs.question: How long does a typical collision repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 3–7 days, depending on the extent of damage and parts availability.

faqs.question: Do you provide a rental car?
faqs.answer: We can help arrange a rental through our partnered providers. Check with your insurance.

services.title: Wheel Alignment & Tire Services
services.shortDescription: Precision alignments, tire rotation, and balancing for a smooth ride.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment extends tire life and improves handling. We use Hunter® alignment machines to adjust camber, caster, and toe to manufacturer specs. Also offering tire rotation, balancing, and new tire installation.
benefits: Even tire wear extends tire life by thousands of miles
Better fuel economy from reduced rolling resistance
Smoother ride and improved steering response
Free alignment check with any tire purchase

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tire condition, pressure, and current alignment angles.

process.title: Adjustment
process.description: We adjust suspension components to factory specifications.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: A road test confirms the alignment is correct and steering is straight.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: Every 6,000 miles or if you notice pulling, uneven tire wear, or after hitting a pothole.

faqs.question: Do you sell tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a wide selection of new tires from major brands at competitive prices.

services.title: Diagnostics & Electrical Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced computer diagnostics and electrical system repairs for modern vehicles.
services.longDescription: Check engine light on? Our technicians use the latest scan tools to read codes and perform in-depth diagnostics. We repair alternators, starters, batteries, wiring, and more. We also reprogram modules and perform software updates.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Fix check engine light and pass emissions tests
Restore electrical functions like windows and locks

process.title: Code Reading
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer and retrieve trouble codes.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We test components like sensors, wiring, and modules.

process.title: Repair & Clear Codes
process.description: We fix the issue and clear codes, then verify the system works.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose a check engine light without an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer walk-in diagnostic services. Just bring your vehicle in and we'll read the codes.

faqs.question: Do you fix car computer modules?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can repair or replace many engine control modules and other electronic units.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Care Since 2008
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repairs and body work at fair prices, treating every customer like family.
story: Ramirez Auto Repair, Body Shop & Wheel Alignment LLC was founded by the Ramirez family with a simple mission: deliver reliable automotive service with integrity. Starting as a small shop on S Fitzhugh Ave, we've grown by earning the trust of Dallas drivers through consistent quality and transparent communication.

Today, our team of certified technicians continues that tradition. We invest in the latest equipment and training to serve modern vehicles, while keeping the personal touch that sets us apart. Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex collision repair, we treat your car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are clear and upfront.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and skilled labor to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: Your time and budget matter. We complete work on schedule and at quoted prices.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local family business, we support Dallas neighborhoods and employ local talent.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Ramirez Auto
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your service.
